input.oracle_text: Choose one — Thraben Charm deals X damage to target creature, where X is twice the number of W mana spent to cast it. Destroy target enchantment. Exile target player's graveyard.
input.handler_signature: Registered ETB; pre-PR-244 implemented (a) destroy enchantment, (b) exile graveyard, (c) fake -1/-1 to creatures (NOT printed). Post-fix: damage / destroy enchantment / exile graveyard.
